title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
